title: stellaria laevis
intro: Stellaria laevis, also known as rough-stemmed starwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. Stellaria laevis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to create a therapeutic remedy.
